recommendations.title: Viking
recommendations.overview: The early Middle Ages. A time of heavy swords and dark blood law. The ruling clan is in discord. The guilt for the accidental death of the brother has fallen on the Grand Duke. According to the law, revenge must be taken by the younger brother, a bas

recommendations.title: The German Doctor
recommendations.overview: Patagonia, 1960. A German doctor meets an Argentinean family and follows them to a town where the family will be starting a new life. The family welcomes the doctor into their home and entrust their young daughter to his care, not knowing that he is

recommendations.title: Abducted in Plain Sight
recommendations.overview: A family falls prey to the manipulative charms of a neighbor, who abducts their adolescent daughter. Twice.

recommendations.title: John Rabe
recommendations.overview: A true-story account of a German businessman who saved more than 200,000 Chinese during the Nanjing massacre in 1937-38.

recommendations.title: Django
recommendations.overview: The story of Django Reinhardt, famous guitarist and composer, and his flight from German-occupied Paris in 1943.

recommendations.title: A Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journali

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Luther
recommendations.overview: During the early 16th century, idealistic German monk Martin Luther, disgusted by the materialism in the church, begins the dialogue that will lead to the Protestant Reformation.

recommendations.title: The Secrets We Keep
recommendations.overview: In post-World War II America, a woman, rebuilding her life in the suburbs with her husband, kidnaps her neighbor and seeks vengeance for the heinous war crimes she believes he committed against her.

recommendations.title: Adam
recommendations.overview: Adam, a lonely man with Asperger's Syndrome, develops a relationship with his upstairs neighbor, Beth.
